headline: Ralph Lauren Stamp Collaboration And Capsule Collection Meet Mixed Market Sentiment
summary: Ralph Lauren (NYSE:RL) has partnered with the U.S. Postal Service to curate a full "American Icons" commemorative stamp series. The collaboration includes an exclusive Ralph Lauren capsule collection inspired by the stamp designs. This is the first time the USPS has asked an individual to curate an entire official stamp issuance. For you as an investor, the news sits at the intersection of brand, culture, and product. Ralph Lauren is best known for premium apparel and accessories, and this...
